Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Representing a financial transaction (income or expense) made by the user

id.description: Unique transaction ID matching document ID

title.description: The description or name of the transaction

category.description: Category key of the transaction (e.g., food, bills)

Budget.title: Budget
Budget.description: Category budget limits defined per month

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: User currency, savings goals, and profile settings

currency.description: User currency choice, e.g., DT, EUR, USD, GBP

/users/{userId}/budgets/{budgetId}.description: Monthly limit preferences for each spending category

/users/{userId}/settings/{settingsId}.description: User specific configuration such as currency and goals
